title: Inside India newsletter: How the war in the Middle East is set to determine India's trade route to Europe
summary_full: As the U.S.-Israel war with Iran rages on, experts say that only one of India's two grand connectivity bets has a real future: IMEC.
summary_public: As the U.S.-Israel war with Iran rages on, experts say that only one of India's two grand connectivity bets has a real future: IMEC.
